Class PlayListDL

java.lang.Object
PlayListDL
public class PlayListDL extends Object
The PlayListDL class manages a collection of songs stored in a DoublyLinkedSongList. It supports adding, searching, navigating, and controlling audio playback with the help of the AudioPlayer class.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PlayListDL(DoublyLinkedSongList dlList)
    Construct a new PlayListDL backed by the given DoublyLinkedSongList.

  • Constructor Details

    • PlayListDL

      public PlayListDL(DoublyLinkedSongList dlList)
      Construct a new PlayListDL backed by the given DoublyLinkedSongList.
      Parameters:
      dlList - the linked dlList of songs

  • Method Details

    • addLast

      public void addLast(Song song)
      Add a song to the end of the PlayListDL.
      Parameters:
      song - the song to add

    • addFirst

      public void addFirst(Song song)
      Add a song to the begining of the PlayListDL.
      Parameters:
      song - the song to add

    • hasNext

      public boolean hasNext()

    • hasPrevious

      public boolean hasPrevious()

    • displayPlayListDL

      public void displayPlayListDL()
      Display all songs in the PlayListDL to the console.

    • getPlayListDL

      public DoublyLinkedSongList getPlayListDL()
      Return the underlying DoublyLinkedSongList.
      Returns:
      the linked dlList of songs

    • getCurrentSong

      public Song getCurrentSong()
      Return the current song, or null if none is set.
      Returns:
      the current song

    • getCurrentIndex

      public int getCurrentIndex()

    • getTotalDuration

      public String getTotalDuration()
      Compute the total duration of the PlayListDL.
      Returns:
      total duration formatted as mm:ss

    • jumpToSong

      public void jumpToSong(int index, AudioPlayer player)
      Set the "current" song by index.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the song (0-based)

    • hasSongs

      public boolean hasSongs()
      Check if the PlayListDL contains any songs.
      Returns:
      true if non-empty, false otherwise

    • nextSong

      public void nextSong(AudioPlayer player)
      Advance to the next song (if any) and start playback.
      Parameters:
      player - the AudioPlayer used to play the song

    • previousSong

      public void previousSong(AudioPlayer player)

    • stopPlayback

      public void stopPlayback(AudioPlayer player)
      Stop audio playback using the given AudioPlayer.
      Parameters:
      player - the AudioPlayer instance

    • playCurrentSong

      public void playCurrentSong(AudioPlayer player)
      Play the current song. If no current song is set, start with the first song in the PlayListDL.
      Parameters:
      player - the AudioPlayer used to play the song

    • findSongByTitle

      public Song findSongByTitle(String title)
      Find a song by its title.
      Parameters:
      title - the song title to search for
      Returns:
      the matching Song, or null if not found

    • findSongsByArtist

      public PlayListDL findSongsByArtist(String artist)
      Find all songs by a given artist. Returns a new PlayListDL containing only those songs.
      Parameters:
      artist - the artist name
      Returns:
      a new PlayListDL of songs by the artist

    • getPlayListDLStatistics

      public void getPlayListDLStatistics()
      Print basic statistics: total number of songs and total duration.

    • playFromStart

      public void playFromStart(AudioPlayer player)
      Start playback from the first song in the PlayListDL, moving through each song sequentially.
      Parameters:
      player - the AudioPlayer to play songs

    • playRandom

      public void playRandom(AudioPlayer player)
      Play a random song from the PlayListDL.
      Parameters:
      player - the AudioPlayer to play the song
